title: Coconut Chewy Dumplings
description: A sweet and chewy twist on traditional dumplings, infused with the flavors of Brazil and coconut.
instructions: Combine coconut milk and Brazilian sugar in a saucepan.
Heat over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Add coconut oil and vanilla extract, stir to combine.
Let sauce cool to room temperature.
Assemble dumplings by placing a tablespoon of sauce inside each wrapper.
Fold and seal dumplings, making sure to press edges tightly.
Steam dumplings for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve warm, garnished with toasted coconut flakes if desired.
